name: Blueberry Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the milk and egg.
3. Pour the milk and egg mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the floured blueberries.
5. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to about 350°F (175°C).
6. Using a small spoon, drop batter by spoonfuls into the hot oil.
7. Fry on one side for about 4 minutes, then turn and fry until browned on the other side.
8. Remove from oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
9. Roll fritters in powdered sugar before serving.
10. Makes 20 to 25 fritters.
